events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Legendary Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Ringo's Beat
angles.copy: Eighty-six years young! Today we're celebrating the one and only Ringo Starr. What's your favourite Beatle track featuring his distinctive drumming?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the legendary Brian May! His guitar riffs shaped generations. What's your go-to Queen anthem?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Still Rolling
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still commanding stages worldwide! Happy birthday to the incomparable Mick Jagger. What's your favourite Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) first launched on this day in 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first broadcast video.

angles.name: Video Killed...
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago, MTV burst onto screens, forever changing music. Its first video? The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. The irony is not lost on us.

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994.

angles.name: Britpop Beginnings
angles.copy: Thirty-two years ago, Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and Britpop was never the same. An undeniable classic. What's your top track from the album?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began 57 years ago
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, '3 Days of Peace & Music', kicked off on this day in 1969 in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since half a million gathered for three days of peace, love, and iconic music at Woodstock. A moment that defined a generation.

events.title: Remembering Elvis Presley, would have been 91
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the passing of 'The King of Rock and Roll', Elvis Presley, who would have been 91.

angles.name: Long Live The King
angles.copy: Forty-nine years today since we lost The King. Elvis Presley's music and legacy continue to inspire generations. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Remembering Tupac Shakur, would have been 55
events.blurb: Today marks 30 years since the tragic passing of hip-hop icon Tupac Shakur, who would have been 55.

angles.name: Hip-Hop Icon
angles.copy: Thirty years today, we remember Tupac Shakur. His powerful lyrics and enduring influence continue to resonate.

events.title: Remembering Jimi Hendrix, would have been 84
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the passing of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84.

angles.name: Guitar God Gone Too Soon
angles.copy: Fifty-six years today, we remember the unparalleled talent of Jimi Hendrix. His groundbreaking guitar work changed music forever.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic 'Abbey Road' album on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Iconic Crossing
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road' and one of the most famous album covers in history. What's your favourite track from the masterpiece?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' frontwoman Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Pretenders Power
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the legendary Chrissie Hynde! Her distinctive voice and rock attitude continue to inspire.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Forever a rock 'n' roll icon. What's your favourite Liam moment?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' turns 55
events.blurb: John Lennon released his timeless anthem 'Imagine' on this day in 1971.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: Fifty-five years since John Lennon gave the world 'Imagine', a song that continues to resonate with its powerful message of peace.

events.title: The first iPod launched 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the original iPod on this day in 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: 1000 Songs In Your Pocket
angles.copy: Twenty-five years ago, Apple introduced the iPod. It changed how we listen to music forever. Do you still have yours?

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: Today marks James Bond Day, celebrating the premiere of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Bond, James Bond
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Sixty-four years since 007 first graced the silver screen. What's your favourite Bond theme tune?

events.title: Remembering John Lennon, would have been 86
events.blurb: Today would have been the 86th birthday of The Beatles legend John Lennon.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the incredible life and enduring musical legacy of John Lennon.
